tasks.title: PTY session manager — handoff, countdown, idx injection
tasks.acceptance_criteria: SessionManager detects session type, injects idx banner every 3 turns, triggers handoff+countdown+restart when threshold exceeded; countdown callable works standalone

tasks.title: CLI cmd_shell — PTY I/O relay loop
tasks.acceptance_criteria: agentflow shell --command claude launches claude under PTY; IDX banners every 3 turns; handoff fires at threshold; terminal restored on exit

tasks.title: PTY — per-turn output token tracking + verbosity compliance signal
tasks.acceptance_criteria: verbosity_log.jsonl accumulates per-turn output token counts; banner fires on verbose turns; shadow analyzer reads mean/p90 vs 150-token target

tasks.title: Provider-keyed rate calibration files: rate_calibration_claude.json / rate_calibration_gemini.json
read_check.py: skip block on empty idx + compress output message
tasks.description: Two fixes to read_check.py PreToolUse hook. (1) False-positive block: when .idx exists but is 0 bytes (file <50 lines or no indexable sections), hook still fires sys.exit(1) — add short-circuit after strip() so empty idx allows full read through. (2) Verbose output: current 3-line error message (~50 tokens) fires into model context on every blocked read; compress to single telegraphic line.
